fileAuditor.title: File Auditor
fileAuditor.description: Traverse a folder file-by-file. Use configurable keyboard shortcuts to navigate, bookmark, or delete.
fileAuditor.autoOpenDescription: Automatically open each file in its default app as you navigate

toolbar.pickFileDisabledTracking: Disabled while tracking is active. You can only pick a file once.

errorBoundary.title: Oops! Something went wrong.
errorBoundary.description: The app encountered an unexpected error. You can help us fix it by reporting it on GitHub.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Control the look and feel of the application.
appearance.alert: Appearance changes, including dark mode, will only apply after restarting the application.
appearance.restartDescription: Some changes require a restart to take effect.

dataFolder.title: Data Folder
dataFolder.description: Contains store.json (bookmarks, settings) and presets. Open it to make backups or migrate your data.

processTracking.title: Process Tracking
processTracking.description:
When enabled, files open via a visible command window. The auditor auto-advances when the viewer is closed.
Important: If an app closes unexpectedly, too soon, or opens in an existing instance, it may cause issues.
processTracking.checkboxDescription: Enables the feature; tracking still must be toggled in the main auditor view.
processTracking.unsupportedOnLinux: Process tracking is not supported on Linux.

globalShortcut.title: Global Close-Viewer Shortcut
globalShortcut.description: Registers the Close Viewer keybind as a system-wide hotkey while auditing. This lets you close the viewer even when it has focus, without switching back to PowerToys.
globalShortcut.checkboxDescription: Only active while auditing with auto-open enabled.

processTracking.title: Process Tracking (Feature Flag)
processTracking.description:
This toggle enables the process tracking feature in the main app.
Once enabled, the File Randomiser will automatically open the next file (or a random file if shuffle is active) whenever a file is closed, until tracking is disabled.
Important: If an app closes unexpectedly, too soon, or opens in an existing instance, it may cause crashes.
processTracking.checkboxDescription: This setting only enables the feature; tracking itself must still be toggled in the main app.
processTracking.unsupportedOnLinux: Process tracking is not supported on Linux due to how process isolation and permissions work.

randomness.title: Randomness
randomness.description: Control how random the file picker feels. Lower values favor the next files in order.

bookmarkPreference.title: Bookmark Preference
bookmarkPreference.description: Give bookmarked files a higher chance of being picked. Set a weight per colour for local and global bookmarks — 1.0 is neutral, higher values increase pick chance.

pathWeights.title: Path Weights
pathWeights.description: Apply per-file and per-folder pick probability multipliers. Set weights from the file tree using the weight button on each item.

debugScores.title: Debug Scores
debugScores.description: Show pick probability scores inline in the file tree. Useful for verifying bookmark weights and randomness behaviour.
